name: DynamicComponentService
description: Service used to dynamically generate components like dialogs/alerts/notifications

methods.name: createDynamicComponent
methods.signature: (content: string | Type<any> | TemplateRef<any> | Record<string, any>, componentType: Type<T>, config: DynamicComponentConfig, inject: { injector: Injector; services: any[] }) => ComponentRef<T>
methods.description: Function that creates dynamic component and injects services to allow communication between component and outside

parameters.name: componentType
parameters.description: Type of component that should be rendered.

parameters.name: config
parameters.description: Configuration that will be passed to the component.

parameters.name: inject
parameters.description: enables to provide preconfigured component injector and dependencies

methods.name: createDynamicModule
methods.signature: (content: string | Type<any> | TemplateRef<any> | Record<string, any>, moduleType: Type<M> | NgModuleFactory<M>, componentType: Type<C>, containerRef: ViewContainerRef, injector?: Injector) => Promise<ComponentRef<C>>
methods.description: Function that creates dynamic component and injects services to allow communication between component and outside

parameters.name: moduleType
parameters.description: Type of module that should be compiled.

parameters.name: componentType
parameters.description: Type of component that should be rendered.

parameters.name: containerRef
parameters.description: The container that the dynamic component is appended to.

parameters.name: injector
parameters.description: enables to provide preconfigured component injector
